title: Mexicanos al grito de guerra
director: Álvaro Gálvez y Fuentes, Ismael Rodríguez
writer: Álvaro Gálvez y Fuentes, Joselito Rodríguez, Elvira de la Mora
actors: Pedro Infante, Lina Montes, Miguel Inclán
plot: In times of the French Intervention, a student of Nunó, author of the Mexican National Anthem, falls in love with the niece of the French Ambassador, which causes quite amusing complications.
